hero.title: Your business on autopilot with AI
hero.subtitle: We build custom bots and automations that work for you 24/7. More efficiency, less manual work, better results.
hero.chat_bot1: Hi! I'm your accounting assistant. Do you need help with your invoices this month?
hero.chat_user: Yes, I want to see the expense summary for March
hero.chat_bot2: Here's your summary: Total expenses: $847,200 | Invoices: 12 | Pending: 3

bots.label: Current products
bots.title: Bots that are already running
bots.subtitle: Built and deployed for real clients. Each bot solves a specific problem with measurable results.
bots.bot1_desc: Intelligent assistant for accountants and accounting firms. Manages queries, organizes documents and answers tax questions automatically.
bots.bot2_desc: Automates content creation and distribution. Generates ideas, adapts formats and schedules posts according to your strategy.
bots.bot3_desc: Send an audio, the bot transcribes what you say and publishes it automatically on your networks. Currently integrated with LinkedIn.

services.label: Services
services.title: Everything we can build for you
services.subtitle: From ready-to-use bots to fully custom solutions tailored to your operation.
services.s1_desc: Your clients book appointments on their own, 24/7. The bot manages availability, confirmations and reminders without manual intervention.
services.s2_desc: We connect your tools and eliminate repetitive tasks. From CRMs to spreadsheets, everything can be automated.
services.s3_desc: We identify which business processes can be enhanced with AI and design a realistic implementation plan.
services.s4_desc: Answer frequent questions, filter leads and escalate complex cases. Less workload, more customer satisfaction.

process.label: The process
process.title: How we work
process.subtitle: A simple and predictable process. You know what to expect at every stage.
process.p1_desc: We analyze your business and identify which processes have the greatest automation potential.
process.p2_desc: We propose a tailored solution with timelines and expected outcomes defined from the start.
process.p3_desc: We build and deploy in 1 to 3 weeks depending on complexity.
process.p4_desc: We accompany you post-launch to adjust, scale and add new features.

cta_section.title: Let's talk about your business
cta_section.subtitle: Tell us what you want to automate and we'll tell you how to make it happen in less than 2 weeks.

services_page.hero_subtitle: From ready-to-use bots to fully custom automations. Find what your business needs.
services_page.bots_subtitle: Proven solutions ready to activate. No custom development, no long waits.
services_page.bot1_desc: Send a document and the bot automatically organizes it in Google Drive and transcribes all the data to a Google Sheet with complete, structured information.
services_page.bot1_f2: Organizes files in Google Drive automatically
services_page.bot1_f3: Transcribes data to Google Sheets with full structure
services_page.bot2_desc: Get weekly reports with the best posts and trends in your niche across the networks you choose: Twitter/X, TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, LinkedIn, and Threads.
services_page.bot2_f1: Weekly trend reports for your niche
services_page.bot2_f4: Best posts of the week, curated for you
services_page.bot2_f5: Delivered to your email or Telegram
services_page.bot2_f6: You choose which networks and niche to follow
services_page.bot3_desc: Send an audio with what you want to communicate, and the bot transcribes it, formats it and publishes it automatically on your networks. The fastest way to create professional content.
services_page.bot3_f3: Text adaptation to social media format
services_page.custom_subtitle: If your business has unique needs, we design the solution from scratch.
services_page.c1_desc: Complete booking system with automatic confirmations, reminders and availability management. Ideal for clinics, offices and services.
services_page.c2_desc: We connect your existing tools and eliminate manual tasks. Zapier, Make, custom APIs — whatever you need.
services_page.c2_price_note: Based on complexity and number of systems
services_page.c3_desc: Answer 80% of frequent queries without human intervention. Integrable with WhatsApp, Telegram, web and email.
services_page.c4_desc: Diagnostic session to identify automation opportunities in your business and an implementation roadmap.
services_page.pack_text: Need multiple bots? We have special discount packs. Let's talk and put something together for you.
services_page.cta_subtitle: Book a free 30-minute call and we'll show you exactly how AI can transform your business.

pricing_page.hero_subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your business. No long contracts, no hidden fees.
pricing_page.plan1_desc: Ideal for entrepreneurs and freelancers who want to automate their first process.
pricing_page.plan2_desc: For businesses that want to scale with multiple bots and automations.
pricing_page.plan3_desc: For companies with complex needs and multiple processes to automate.
pricing_page.ot1_desc: Implementation of one of our available bots with customized configuration for your needs.
pricing_page.ot2_price_note: Based on complexity and number of systems
pricing_page.ot2_desc: Development of a fully custom automation for your business.
pricing_page.ot3_desc: Deep diagnosis of your business and identification of AI automation opportunities.
pricing_page.pack_text: If your business requires multiple bots or a combination of automations, we put together a custom pack at a special price. Let's talk and design the ideal solution.
pricing_page.faq_q1: Can I change my plan at any time?
pricing_page.faq_a1: Yes. You can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes apply on your next billing cycle.
pricing_page.faq_q2: What happens if I need more conversations than included?
pricing_page.faq_a2: We'll notify you when you're approaching the limit. You can upgrade your plan or add extra conversations without changing your entire plan.
pricing_page.faq_q3: Do existing bots have a setup fee?
pricing_page.faq_a3: Yes, there is a one-time setup fee covering configuration and integration with your tools: Audio → LinkedIn bot $79 USD, Content Creator bot $99 USD, Accounting bot $149 USD. After that you only pay the monthly subscription.
pricing_page.faq_q4: Can I pay just for the setup without a subscription?
pricing_page.faq_a4: For individual bots yes, we offer one-time project pricing. Same for custom automations. Contact us for your specific case.
pricing_page.faq_a5: All plans include email support. The Pro plan has priority response within 24h. For the Enterprise plan, we define a custom SLA.
pricing_page.faq_q6: What payment methods do you accept?
pricing_page.faq_a6: We accept PayPal for all plans. Payments are in USD.
pricing_page.faq_q7: What does the strategic consulting session include?
pricing_page.faq_a7: It's a 60-minute Google Meet session where we deeply analyze your business. At the end you receive a PDF with the automation roadmap, a prioritized list of opportunities, and cost estimates. Price: $25 USD.
pricing_page.cta_title: Not sure which plan to choose?
pricing_page.cta_subtitle: Book a free call and we'll help you find the ideal solution for your business and budget.

about_page.hero_subtitle: We are a team specialized in AI applied to real businesses. We don't sell hype — we build solutions that work.
about_page.history_p1: Synera was born from a simple question: why are businesses still doing manually what a machine can do better and faster?
about_page.history_p2: We started building automations for individual clients and quickly saw the same pattern repeating: businesses with inefficient processes, overwhelmed owners and underused technology.
about_page.history_p3: Today we combine AI, automation and strategy so our clients can focus on what truly matters: growing their business.
about_page.team_subtitle: A small, focused team with real experience in AI and automation.
about_page.member1_bio: Leads the company's vision and strategy. Passionate about the intersection of AI and real business problems.
about_page.member2_bio: Defines and develops Synera's products. Focused on building solutions that clients actually want to use.
about_page.member3_bio: Leads marketing and brand communication. Specialized in digital positioning and content strategy.
about_page.values_subtitle: Four principles that define how we work and what kind of company we want to be.
about_page.v1_desc: We build solutions that work without overcomplicating what already works. Technology should simplify, not add friction.
about_page.v2_desc: We don't measure success by how sophisticated the system is, but by the real impact on the client's business.
about_page.v3_desc: Clear pricing, realistic timelines and direct communication. No empty promises, no surprises at the end.
about_page.v4_desc: The day we stop learning is the day we stop being useful. We constantly iterate on what we build.
about_page.cta_subtitle: If you have a project in mind or simply want to explore how AI can help your business, let's talk.

footer.tagline: Built with AI, for those who use AI
